title: Travel complaint and solution
subtitle: Complain politely and ask for a practical solution.
duolingoBridge: B1 Med trains native-style but level-appropriate French: natural chunks, connected answers, listening strategy, and practical output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: explain the issue calmly.
Knowledge point 2: request a specific solution.

sections.title: Natural tools
rows: I would like to know if...

items.fr: Je comprends bien que le retard n’était pas prévu.
items.en: I understand that the delay was not planned.
items.es: Entiendo bien que el retraso no estaba previsto.

items.fr: Cependant, cela m’a posé problème pour ma correspondance.
items.en: However, that caused me a problem for my connection.
items.es: Sin embargo, eso me causó un problema para mi conexión.

items.fr: J’ai dû acheter un nouveau billet à la dernière minute.
items.en: I had to buy a new ticket at the last minute.
items.es: Tuve que comprar un nuevo billete en el último momento.

items.fr: Je souhaiterais savoir si un remboursement est possible.
items.en: I would like to know if a refund is possible.
items.es: Quisiera saber si es posible un reembolso.

items.fr: J’espère que nous pourrons trouver une solution acceptable.
items.en: I hope that we can find an acceptable solution.
items.es: Espero que podamos encontrar una solución aceptable.
